$notes.type_changes_independent_of_property: delta.typeChanges in the schema records the history of type changes already applied and is independent of the delta.enableTypeWidening property. When typeWidening is listed in readerFeatures, readers must validate and accept or reject all delta.typeChanges entries regardless of whether the property is currently set.
$notes.preview_is_preratification_name: typeWidening-preview was the feature name used in implementations during the RFC development phase (delta-io/delta#4094). The final RFC draft matched the ratified spec; implementations tracking the RFC used the same semantics as typeWidening. Tables created with typeWidening-preview use the same protocol semantics as typeWidening.

cases.name: type_widening_create_table_3_7_feature_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[typeWidening] table with delta.enableTypeWidening=true succeeds.

cases.name: type_widening_create_table_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_property_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (3,7) table with delta.enableTypeWidening=true but typeWidening absent from both feature lists succeeds.

cases.name: type_widening_create_table_writer_only_feature_listed_fails
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[typeWidening in writerFeatures only] table fails; typeWidening requires the feature in both readerFeatures and writerFeatures.

cases.name: type_widening_read_snapshot_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_property_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7) table with delta.enableTypeWidening=true but typeWidening absent from both feature lists succeeds.

cases.name: type_widening_supported_not_enabled_no_type_changes_read_snapshot_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7)+[typeWidening] table with delta.enableTypeWidening absent and no delta.typeChanges in the schema succeeds.

cases.name: type_widening_supported_enabled_no_type_changes_read_snapshot_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7)+[typeWidening] table with delta.enableTypeWidening=true but no delta.typeChanges in the schema succeeds.

cases.name: type_widening_supported_has_supported_type_change_read_snapshot_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7)+[typeWidening] table with a supported delta.typeChanges entry (short to integer) in the schema succeeds.

cases.name: type_widening_read_snapshot_unsupported_type_change_in_schema_fails
cases.description: Reading a (3,7)+[typeWidening] table with an unsupported delta.typeChanges entry (long to integer, a narrowing) in the schema fails; readers must reject unsupported type changes.
cases.note: The setup injects a delta.typeChanges entry recording long->integer (a narrowing, not a valid widening) directly via the log, bypassing writer validation. The spec requires readers to fail on any unsupported type change found in delta.typeChanges when typeWidening is in readerFeatures.

cases.name: type_widening_orphan_type_changes_annotation_read_snapshot_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7) table with delta.typeChanges in the schema but typeWidening absent from both feature lists succeeds; the spec only requires readers to validate delta.typeChanges when typeWidening is in readerFeatures.

cases.name: type_widening_read_snapshot_type_changes_in_schema_without_feature_in_reader_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7)+[typeWidening in writerFeatures only] table with delta.typeChanges in the schema succeeds; readers only validate delta.typeChanges when typeWidening is in readerFeatures.

cases.name: type_widening_empty_commit_3_7_feature_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7)+[typeWidening] table with delta.enableTypeWidening=true succeeds.

cases.name: type_widening_empty_commit_supported_not_active_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7)+[typeWidening] table without delta.enableTypeWidening=true succeeds.

cases.name: type_widening_empty_commit_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_property_succeeds
cases.description: Appending to a (3,7) table with delta.enableTypeWidening=true but typeWidening absent from both feature lists succeeds.

cases.name: type_widening_preview_create_table_3_7_feature_listed_succeeds
cases.description: Creating a (3,7)+[typeWidening-preview] table with delta.enableTypeWidening=true succeeds; typeWidening-preview is the pre-ratification name for typeWidening and shares its spec semantics.

cases.name: type_widening_preview_read_snapshot_3_7_no_feature_listed_with_property_succeeds
cases.description: Reading a (3,7) table with delta.enableTypeWidening=true but typeWidening-preview absent from both feature lists succeeds.
